title: cleghornia henryi
intro: Cleghornia henryi, also known as Henry's cleghoria, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Cleghornia henryi has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleghornia henryi include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. Cleghornia henryi can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, and in some cases, its roots and leaves may be used in traditional remedies, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and safety.
